visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women with long dark hair walk toward the white-and-black entrance of the 'JIN.HER' restaurant. One wears a green maxi dress and white shoes, while the other wears grey trousers and a black crop top. The setting is an urban street during the day. (2) The scene shifts indoors to a brightly lit restaurant with aesthetic decor, featuring large cream-colored hot air balloon models and dried pampas grass. The lighting is bright and warm. (3) A close-up shows a server's hands flipping through a leather-bound menu to reveal various drink and food options. (4) A 'Durian Coconut Jelly Drink' is presented in a textured glass, layered with creamy white liquid and topped with a scoop of ice cream and a lime slice. A woman in a black top sips the drink and talks to the camera. (5) A 'Durian Latte' is shown in a spherical glass, displaying distinct layers of brown coffee and thick yellow durian pulp. A woman points at the pulp through the glass. (6) A 'Durian Corn Pizza' sits on a decorative blue and white plate, topped with ham and small yellow puffs. The two women are seen sharing the pizza and discussing its flavor. (7) A stack of fluffy souffle pancakes is served, topped with a large piece of durian fruit. A hand pours a thick, yellow durian sauce over the pancakes from a small metal pitcher. (8) One woman takes a bite of the souffle and reacts dramatically, covering her mouth and leaning back as if overwhelmed by the smell, while the other woman laughs. (9) The final shot shows a menu page titled 'Season of the King' featuring professional photos of the durian-themed dishes previously seen.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: *大白天的跑來網美店. [Logo]: JIN.HER 今鶴. (2) [Variety]: 榴槤椰果凍飲. (3) [Subtitle]: 你形容一下他口感. [Variety]: 是黏的嗎? 不黏. 很像椰奶. (4) [Variety]: *交換喝. (5) [Subtitle]: 很東南亞的味道. 就好像在泰國. (6) [Variety]: 榴槤拿鐵. [Subtitle]: 榴槤果肉. (7) [Variety]: 榴槤乖乖PIZZA. [Subtitle]: 應該可以試試. 不討厭的人都可以吃. (8) [Variety]: 榴槤望返舒芙蕾. [Subtitle]: 他上面的榴槤果肉很猛欸. (9) [Variety]: *有夠調皮. *聲討死. [Subtitle]: 吃吃看. (10) [Variety]: 讚賞!! *好吃到太驚艷. 是稱讚喲~ (11) [Slogan]: Season of the King. New!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 server's hands, 1 passer-by in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One female has long wavy dark hair and wears a light green dress. The second female has long straight dark hair, wearing a black crop top and grey baggy pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts outside a restaurant with a modern white facade and black text. Indoors, the restaurant has a 'bohemian chic' style with hot air balloon props, dried floral arrangements, and light wood furniture.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with the rustling sound of wind and walking outdoors, layered with high-energy female voices. (2) As the setting moves indoors, a cheerful, acoustic guitar-driven BGM enters the mix. (3) A distinct paper-flipping sound triggers as the menu is shown. (4) A female voice describes the durian drink with a high-pitched, excited tone and rapid speech rate. (5) The sound of a straw suction and liquid swirling is heard, followed by a 'ding' SFX emphasizing a text pop-up. (6) A sharp rustling sound occurs as a pizza slice is lifted. (7) Both female voices overlap in conversation, accompanied by occasional low-level background restaurant chatter. (8) A thick pouring sound effect is synchronized with the sauce being drizzled onto the souffle. (9) A loud, exaggerated comedic gagging sound and subsequent laughter from the main speakers occurs, layered with a cartoon 'boing' sound effect. (10) The BGM continues smoothly in a major key until the track ends.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Dining Intro -> Dish 1 Review -> Dish 2 Review -> Dish 3 Review -> Humorous Conclusion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle food vlog to review and promote a series of seasonal durian-based dishes at 'JIN.HER' restaurant, using humor and high-energy presentation to engage viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear brand logo presentation, review of specific seasonal menu items, and showing the physical menu.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media food review editing styles, including fast cuts and variety-show captions, to create a lighthearted and persuasive commercial appeal.
